title: Blocking Sync Function Calls in Async FunctionTool
description: FunctionTool.run_async executes synchronous functions directly in the event loop, blocking it.
rationale: Clear fix available using asyncio.to_thread or run_in_executor. High impact as it blocks the main loop.

title: Blocking Sync Call in Async APIHubToolset.get_tools
description: APIHubToolset.get_tools calls _prepare_toolset synchronously, which performs blocking network I/O.
rationale: The _prepare_toolset method makes blocking network calls. It should be awaited or run in a thread.

title: Inefficient Regex Compilation in LLMRegistry
description: re.compile is called inside a loop for every model resolution.
rationale: Regexes should be compiled once at registration time. Fix involves changing the registry storage structure.
